title: sigesbeckia pubescens var. glabrescens
intro: Sigesbeckia pubescens var. glabrescens, also known as Chinese Mugwort or Wild Chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sigesbeckia pubescens var. glabrescens include reducing inflammation and pain, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
